{{Quote|My Lord, Star Destroyer ''Colossus'' reports that the Rebels are preparing to evacuate D'rinba IV.|Unidentified Admiral to Darth Vader|<ref name="Star Wars: The Interactive Video Board Game">''[[Star Wars: The Interactive Video Board Game]]''</ref>}}
'''''Colossus''''' was an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]].

When [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] decided to destroy the Rebel world [[D'rinba IV]], he took two Star Destroyers as escorts, including ''Colossus''. It was the first to reach D'rinba and encountered an evacuating Rebel transport, but was disabled by a shot from a Rebel [[planetary ion cannon]].

The ''Colossus'' was also used to reinforce TIE Fighters defending an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] depot that had been overwhelmed by X-Wings and Y-Wings. It arrived and launched TIE Bombers and TIE Interceptors, along with Tugs to rescue the Depot's containers.

==Behind the scenes==
''Colossus'' is represented by the [[Rebel Dream|''Tyrant'']] in the board game video, using footage recycled from [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']].

The ''Colossus'' only arrives in TIE Fighter if one requests reinforcements.
